title: Metalism
description: A Mod that adds more Metals and Ores to Minecraft
body:
**Overview:**
The "Metalism" mod introduces Steel as a new material in Minecraft. Steel offers a powerful alternative to iron and bridges the gap between iron and diamond. With upgraded tools, armor, and simple crafting mechanics, this mod is perfect for players looking to mine, fight, and build more efficiently.

Features:
Steel Crafting:

Materials Required:
Iron Ingots.
Crafting Process:
Smelt iron ingots in a furnace or blast furnace to create Steel Ingots. The process is straightforward and easily integrates into your existing gameplay.



Steel Tools:

Steel Pickaxe:
Faster mining speed and greater durability than iron, making it perfect for harvesting valuable resources.

Steel Shovel:
Ideal for quick excavation of dirt, sand, and gravel.

Steel Sword:
Deals more damage and lasts longer than an iron sword, making it an excellent choice for combat.

Steel Hoe & Axe:
Efficient and durable, great for farming and chopping wood.
Steel Armor:

Offers better protection than iron while being more affordable than diamond.
Durable and reliable for cave exploration, combat, and adventuring.
Balancing:

Steel tools and armor are balanced to fit between iron and diamond, ensuring a smooth progression in the game.

Gameplay Benefits:

Simple Crafting:

Upgrade iron into steel without needing additional resources or complicated mechanics.
Efficiency: Steel provides greater durability and power compared to iron, without disrupting game balance.

Versatility:

Use steel for all kinds of adventures, from mining and building to combat and exploration.
